The '''MD-10 medical droid''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. The design was a breakout success, and each droid was built to be a specialist within a particular medical field, including cardiology, neurology, obstetrics, and dentistry.<ref name="EGTD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
